result.finding: runs/pfas-rice-oos-lipid: even with the lipid mechanism, the worst-case out-of-sample grain miss is PFOS endosperm ~5x under (log10 0.7); GenX (ether) is over-predicted (provisional offset). So the tool is SCREENING-grade with BOUNDED uncertainty, not regulatory-precision -- dietary use must apply congener-specific uncertainty factors (~3x typical, up to ~5x for PFSA endosperm / ether).
